name: Kenya-Ethiopia-Somalia Daua River Protocol
blocking_factor: Tri-border diplomatic complexity — three sovereign governments
notes: IGAD brokered framework discussions 2016 and 2019. No binding agreement. Ethiopia upstream dam releases occur without downstream notification. Somalia engagement not formalised.

name: Mandera County Flood Early Warning
blocking_factor: Telecommunications blackspots and insecurity limiting gauge installation
notes: 6 rainfall gauges installed. 3 vandalised or stolen. Gauge on Daua at border not operational. Alert reaches Mandera Town only — not Elwak or Lafey.

name: Mandera Town Flood Bund
notes: Design complete. Two contractors withdrew citing security concerns. NDOC has partially implemented emergency earthworks without engineering oversight.

name: Flood-Resilient Shelter — ASAL Counties
blocking_factor: ASAL counties deprioritised in national housing programme
notes: Programme designed for 6 ASAL counties. Mandera allocation not disbursed. NHC mandate focuses on urban areas.

name: Mandera Riparian Settlement Management
blocking_factor: Security constraints and governance capacity in border county
notes: Riparian buffer mapped by NEMA 2020. County enforcement capacity severely limited by security situation and staff retention challenges.
